step_rationale: Early acute cardiac ischemia marker; metabolic adaptation during hypoxia.
mechanism: Nucleoside byproduct of ATP degradation during myocardial ischemia, signaling rapid cardiomyocyte energy stress.

references.title: Unbiased metabolomics screening for potential biomarkers in patients with In-stent restenosis post percutaneous coronary intervention.
Metabolomic analysis of serum and myocardium in compensated heart failure after myocardial infarction.
Inosine and hypoxanthine as novel biomarkers for cardiac ischemia: from bench to point-of-care.
